replies.author: @jamesross1003
replies.text: Good point!  LOL considering that the modern bra was created with two purposes anyway.  Fun fact:  the modern bra was made as it is to be breakable in the middle to be used as two face masks in the case of a gas attack during war time(designed during the world wars period).  So another use would be great and funny.

author: @mac-qt3wd
text: Lovely stuff, Rob can you spin a motor/alternator by putting it near a live cable? I've seen this camera which is powered by clamping it over a power line (for military/defence apparently) for use in remote areas, electromagnetic induction obviously, but can you spin magnets with the magnetic field of the power line/cable or by inducing a current into the coils?
